title: Fit test - Successfully completing the Fit Test
scenario: Fit Test completes successfully showing "This is a good fit!" message with both earbuds marked "Good" on Voyager Free 60/60+/20
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Poly device (Voyager Free 60/60+/20) connected and correctly positioned in the ears.
2. Go to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. Tap Start to begin the Fit Test.
expected: "This is a good fit!" message appears, both earbuds show "Good" tag with icon, and "Done" button is displayed. Tapping "Done" returns the user to the Device Home Screen (or Onboarding if triggered during onboarding).
